ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cashew nut, dry-grilled, no added salt

ingredients_text: Flame Raisins (26%) [Raisins, Sunflower Oil], Blanched Peanuts (20%), Golden Raisins (15%) [Raisins, Sunflower Oil, Preservative (Sulphur Dioxide)], Cashew Nuts (15%), Walnuts (10%), Sweetened Dried Cranberries (8%) [Cranberries, Sugar, Sunflower Oil], Brazil Nuts (6%)
